items.caption: A scene from a phoenix metropolitan community's solid waste department, where a large, industrial trash compactor is in operation. the compactor, with its mechanical arm extended, is actively engaged in the process of collecting and compacting waste. the foreground is dominated by a pile of discarded items, predominantly cardboard and plastic, which are being fed into the compactor. the background reveals a concrete wall, possibly part of the facility's infrastructure. the image provides a glimpse into the behind-the-scenes operations of municipal waste management.
